---
title: "PyTorch Gym"
---

::: {.lab-question}
**Główna idea:** obecne laboratoria uczą intuicji, a PyTorch Gym wymusza sprawność implementacyjną. Student nie tylko widzi `nn.Linear` albo attention, ale koduje ich rdzeń od zera i dostaje natychmiastową informację zwrotną.
:::

## Jak korzystać

1. Najpierw przeczytaj odpowiedni lab w kursie.
2. Otwórz wskazane zadania z PyTorch Gym.
3. Zaimplementuj funkcję lub moduł bez zaglądania do rozwiązania.
4. Uruchom komórkę z `check("task_id")`.
5. Dopiero po własnej próbie porównaj rozwiązanie referencyjne.

Lokalnie, z katalogu repozytorium:

```powershell
python -m venv .venv
.\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1
pip install -e .
pip install -e ./src
jupyter lab src/templates/00_welcome.ipynb
```

W Colabie zacznij od notebooka startowego: [00_welcome.ipynb](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/00_welcome.ipynb).

::: {.callout-tip}
## Efektywny rytm
Nie rób wszystkich zadań liniowo. Najpierw przejdź ścieżkę rdzeniową: `relu`, `softmax`, `linear`, `cross_entropy`, `linear_regression`, `dropout`, `layernorm`, `attention`, `mha`, `adam`, `gradient_clipping`. Reszta jest rozszerzeniem pod transformery, inferencję i alignment.
:::

## Katalog zadań

### Tensor mechanics and losses

Najpierw opanuj stabilne operacje na tensorach, broadcasting, indeksowanie i funkcje celu.

| Zadanie | Implementujesz | Poziom | Start | Odpowiedź | Po co |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Implement ReLU | `relu` | Easy | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/01_relu.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/01_relu.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/01_relu_solution.ipynb) | Element-wise ops and gradient flow. |
| Implement Softmax | `my_softmax` | Easy | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/02_softmax.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/02_softmax.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/02_softmax_solution.ipynb) | Numerical stability before losses and attention. |
| Cross-Entropy Loss | `cross_entropy_loss` | Easy | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/16_cross_entropy.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/16_cross_entropy.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/16_cross_entropy_solution.ipynb) | Classification loss from logits. |
| Simple Linear Layer | `SimpleLinear` | Medium | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/03_linear.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/03_linear.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/03_linear_solution.ipynb) | `nn.Parameter`, affine maps, shape discipline. |
| Linear Regression | `LinearRegression` | Medium | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/40_linear_regression.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/40_linear_regression.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/40_linear_regression_solution.ipynb) | Closed form, manual GD and `nn.Linear` in one task. |

### Neural network building blocks

Potem buduj warstwy jako `nn.Module` i ucz się, kiedy parametry, bufory i tryb train/eval zmieniają zachowanie modelu.

| Zadanie | Implementujesz | Poziom | Start | Odpowiedź | Po co |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Implement Dropout | `MyDropout` | Easy | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/17_dropout.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/17_dropout.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/17_dropout_solution.ipynb) | Different behavior in train and eval mode. |
| Embedding Layer | `MyEmbedding` | Easy | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/18_embedding.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/18_embedding.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/18_embedding_solution.ipynb) | Lookup tables for discrete tokens and codebooks. |
| GELU Activation | `my_gelu` | Easy | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/19_gelu.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/19_gelu.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/19_gelu_solution.ipynb) | Modern activation used in transformer MLPs. |
| Kaiming Initialization | `kaiming_init` | Easy | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/20_weight_init.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/20_weight_init.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/20_weight_init_solution.ipynb) | Variance control before training starts. |
| Implement LayerNorm | `my_layer_norm` | Medium | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/04_layernorm.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/04_layernorm.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/04_layernorm_solution.ipynb) | Per-token normalization for sequence models. |
| Implement BatchNorm | `my_batch_norm` | Medium | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/07_batchnorm.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/07_batchnorm.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/07_batchnorm_solution.ipynb) | Batch statistics and running estimates. |
| Implement RMSNorm | `rms_norm` | Medium | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/08_rmsnorm.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/08_rmsnorm.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/08_rmsnorm_solution.ipynb) | LLaMA-style normalization with fewer moving parts. |
| SwiGLU MLP | `SwiGLUMLP` | Medium | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/15_mlp.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/15_mlp.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/15_mlp_solution.ipynb) | Gated feed-forward block used in modern LLMs. |
| 2D Convolution | `my_conv2d` | Medium | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/22_conv2d.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/22_conv2d.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/22_conv2d_solution.ipynb) | Vision tensor geometry via unfold/stride/padding. |

### Attention and transformer anatomy

Ta część rozkłada transformer na części: uwaga, maskowanie, głowy, pozycja i cache w dekodowaniu.

| Zadanie | Implementujesz | Poziom | Start | Odpowiedź | Po co |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Softmax Attention | `scaled_dot_product_attention` | Hard | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/05_attention.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/05_attention.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/05_attention_solution.ipynb) | The core `softmax(QK^T/sqrt(d))V` operation. |
| Multi-Head Attention | `MultiHeadAttention` | Hard | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/06_multihead_attention.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/06_multihead_attention.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/06_multihead_attention_solution.ipynb) | Split, project, attend and concatenate heads. |
| Causal Self-Attention | `causal_attention` | Hard | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/09_causal_attention.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/09_causal_attention.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/09_causal_attention_solution.ipynb) | Autoregressive mask for GPT-style models. |
| Multi-Head Cross-Attention | `MultiHeadCrossAttention` | Medium | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/23_cross_attention.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/23_cross_attention.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/23_cross_attention_solution.ipynb) | Decoder queries over encoder memory. |
| Grouped Query Attention | `GroupQueryAttention` | Hard | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/10_gqa.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/10_gqa.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/10_gqa_solution.ipynb) | KV sharing used to reduce inference cost. |
| Sliding Window Attention | `sliding_window_attention` | Hard | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/11_sliding_window.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/11_sliding_window.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/11_sliding_window_solution.ipynb) | Local attention and sequence-length scaling. |
| Linear Self-Attention | `linear_attention` | Hard | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/12_linear_attention.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/12_linear_attention.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/12_linear_attention_solution.ipynb) | Kernelized attention and complexity trade-offs. |
| KV Cache Attention | `KVCacheAttention` | Hard | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/14_kv_cache.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/14_kv_cache.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/14_kv_cache_solution.ipynb) | Prefill/decode split for fast generation. |
| Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) | `apply_rope` | Hard | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/24_rope.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/24_rope.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/24_rope_solution.ipynb) | Position information through vector rotation. |
| Flash Attention (Tiled) | `flash_attention` | Hard | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/25_flash_attention.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/25_flash_attention.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/25_flash_attention_solution.ipynb) | Memory-aware attention with tiled softmax. |
| GPT-2 Transformer Block | `GPT2Block` | Hard | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/13_gpt2_block.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/13_gpt2_block.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/13_gpt2_block_solution.ipynb) | Residual, norm, attention and MLP as one block. |

### Training, adaptation and systems

Tutaj ćwiczysz pętlę uczenia, schedulery, stabilizację gradientów i lekką adaptację dużych modeli.

| Zadanie | Implementujesz | Poziom | Start | Odpowiedź | Po co |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Adam Optimizer | `MyAdam` | Medium | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/29_adam.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/29_adam.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/29_adam_solution.ipynb) | Optimizer internals: moments and bias correction. |
| Cosine LR Scheduler with Warmup | `cosine_lr_schedule` | Medium | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/30_cosine_lr.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/30_cosine_lr.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/30_cosine_lr_solution.ipynb) | Warmup and annealing schedule from scratch. |
| Gradient Norm Clipping | `clip_grad_norm` | Easy | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/21_gradient_clipping.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/21_gradient_clipping.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/21_gradient_clipping_solution.ipynb) | Stabilize training without changing direction too much. |
| Gradient Accumulation | `accumulated_step` | Easy | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/31_gradient_accumulation.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/31_gradient_accumulation.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/31_gradient_accumulation_solution.ipynb) | Large effective batch on small hardware. |
| LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) | `LoRALinear` | Medium | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/26_lora.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/26_lora.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/26_lora_solution.ipynb) | Low-rank adaptation with frozen base weights. |
| ViT Patch Embedding | `PatchEmbedding` | Medium | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/27_vit_patch.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/27_vit_patch.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/27_vit_patch_solution.ipynb) | Image patches as transformer tokens. |
| Mixture of Experts (MoE) | `MixtureOfExperts` | Hard | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/28_moe.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/28_moe.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/28_moe_solution.ipynb) | Routing tokens to specialist MLPs. |

### Inference and alignment

Na końcu przechodzisz do tokenizacji, dekodowania i funkcji celu używanych przy dostrajaniu modeli językowych.

| Zadanie | Implementujesz | Poziom | Start | Odpowiedź | Po co |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Top-k / Top-p Sampling | `sample_top_k_top_p` | Medium | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/32_topk_sampling.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/32_topk_sampling.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/32_topk_sampling_solution.ipynb) | Temperature, top-k and nucleus sampling. |
| Beam Search Decoding | `beam_search` | Medium | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/33_beam_search.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/33_beam_search.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/33_beam_search_solution.ipynb) | Search over multiple sequence hypotheses. |
| Speculative Decoding | `speculative_decode` | Hard | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/34_speculative_decoding.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/34_speculative_decoding.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/34_speculative_decoding_solution.ipynb) | Draft/target generation speedup. |
| Byte-Pair Encoding (BPE) | `SimpleBPE` | Hard | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/35_bpe.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/35_bpe.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/35_bpe_solution.ipynb) | Subword tokenization mechanics. |
| INT8 Quantized Linear | `Int8Linear` | Hard | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/36_int8_quantization.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/36_int8_quantization.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/36_int8_quantization_solution.ipynb) | Compression with scales, zero-points and buffers. |
| DPO (Direct Preference Optimization) Loss | `dpo_loss` | Hard | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/37_dpo_loss.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/37_dpo_loss.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/37_dpo_loss_solution.ipynb) | Preference optimization as a logit-ratio loss. |
| GRPO (Group Relative Policy Optimization) Loss | `grpo_loss` | Hard | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/38_grpo_loss.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/38_grpo_loss.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/38_grpo_loss_solution.ipynb) | Group-normalized policy optimization. |
| PPO (Proximal Policy Optimization) Clipped Loss | `ppo_loss` | Hard | [Notebook](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/39_ppo_loss.ipynb) / [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/templates/39_ppo_loss.ipynb) | [Solution](https://github.com/machine-learning-lectures/lecture-pytorch/blob/master/src/solutions/39_ppo_loss_solution.ipynb) | Clipped policy-gradient objective. |
